function.message: I can’t complete this inbox request yet because one explicitly required file path is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_03_25__eur_000025__bill__school_helper_label_tape.md` (file not found). Please provide the correct 5th path (or confirm removal of item #5), and I will process all listed files.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox-processing rule that explicit file lists are exact/complete and must be processed with no substitutions; also applied no-partial-completion clarification rule when a required file is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction explicitly lists 5 paths in `00_inbox/724_next-task.md`. The exact 5th path could not be read (file not found), and a workspace search found that name only in the inbox message, not as an existing record. Therefore the task cannot be completed without guessing/substituting a file.
